af_score_components.notes: Amazon MCP (general). Has MCP (quality 75). E-commerce platform integration. Documentation good. OAuth2 or API key required. Rate limits documented. Retail focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced (AWS). OAuth2 with granular scopes. SOC2/PCI-DSS compliant. Customer data (sensitive). Fine-grained permissions. Excellent security posture.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Amazon infrastructure. Enterprise SLA. Cursor pagination. Retry guidance. Ideal for e-commerce automation at scale.

af_score_components.notes: Amazon Seller (not MCP documented). API for seller operations. Documentation good. OAuth2 required. Rate limits clear. Seller operations focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. OAuth2 with scopes. Business data (sensitive). Fine-grained access control. Strong security.

af_score_components.notes: Amazon Seller MCP. Has MCP (quality 75). Seller Central operations. Documentation adequate. OAuth2 required. Rate limits documented. Seller automation focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. OAuth2. Business-sensitive seller data. Fine-grained permissions (inventory, orders, shipping). Strong security posture.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Amazon infrastructure. Suitable for seller automation at scale.

af_score_components.notes: Amazon Seller MCP (variant). Has MCP (quality 75). Seller operations. Documentation moderate. OAuth2. Rate limits. Similar to amazon-seller-mcp.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. OAuth2. Strong security. Amazon infrastructure.

af_score_components.notes: Analog MCP (purpose unclear). Has MCP (quality 70). Possibly signal processing or hardware-related. Documentation moderate. No auth documented. Early stage.
analytics (generic). No MCP documented. Documentation moderate. Purpose for data analytics. Early stage or incomplete.

security_score_components.security_notes: Analytics data sensitive. Auth likely. Cannot fully evaluate.

af_score_components.notes: Analytics Engine MCP. Has MCP (quality 75). Data analytics processing. Documentation adequate. Auth for analytics. Rate limits. Data analysis focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Auth required. Analytics data sensitive. Fine-grained access control. Suitable for data pipelines.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Data engine reliability important. Suitable for analytics automation.

af_score_components.notes: Ancestry MCP. Has MCP (quality 70). Genealogy/ancestry data access. Documentation moderate. Auth for ancestry platform. Rate limits. Family history focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Ancestry.com infrastructure. Family data (PII-sensitive). Strong auth required. GDPR/privacy compliant. Genealogy data requires protection.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Ancestry.com has enterprise reliability. Genealogy data immutable (historical). Suitable for family research automation.

af_score_components.notes: Android ADB MCP server. Has MCP (quality 70). Android Debug Bridge interface. Documentation adequate. No auth required (local device). Rate limits for ADB. Android dev focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local device communication (USB or network). ADB trust model (device must trust host). No encryption (local). Device access requires trust. Potential for APK installation/modification.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: ADB reliability (Android SDK). Device connection stability. Suitable for Android development automation.

af_score_components.notes: Android MCP server. Has MCP (quality 75). Android SDK integration. Documentation good. No auth (local). Rate limits for operations. Android development focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local development tool. APK/code access. No network security (local). Emulator trust model. Credentials in dev code risk.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Android SDK stability. Emulator/device reliability. Suitable for Android automation.
